message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "Wellbie" as Wellbie
participant "Quis" as Quis
participant "UserDigitalProfile\n(User Profile)" as UserProfile
participant "Challanges" as Challenges
participant "Achievements" as Achievements
participant "Points" as Points
participant "Rewards" as Rewards

frame general_use_case {
    User -> Wellbie : Sets a Goal
    activate Wellbie
    
    Wellbie --> Quis 
    deactivate Wellbie
    activate Quis 
    
    Quis --> UserProfile  : Select from list
    deactivate Quis
    activate UserProfile
    
    alt creates or accepts
        UserProfile ->> Challenges  
        
        loop Confirms with ML and Garmin watch activity logs
            
            Challenges <-> Achievements 
            
        end
        
    else rejects goal
         note right of UserProfile: Rejects if not feasible \nor safe for user health profile.
         
     end
     
     
end


group rewards_from_sponsors #LightBlue
  
   Achievement <- - Point : Collect confirmed
   
   
   point -->> reward : Spends to bonus 

    
  

@enduml
